chapter goal: Which numerical quantity survives when a line is reparametrized projectively?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points

gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 4 is represented by line diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.
